offer_shift.description: Paired t-test on proposer_share/pool. PRIMARY significance test.

acceptance_shift.description: Chi-square or Fisher's exact on accept/reject counts. PRIMARY significance test.

payoff_delta_reference_only.description: T-test on payoff/pool. REFERENCE ONLY — zero-inflated by rejections. Use offer_shift and acceptance_shift for significance claims.
payoff_delta_reference_only.warning: p_value unreliable — do not use for significance claims

10.0.plain_english_claim: Steering significantly shifted proposer offers lower by -9.3% of pool (offer shift p=9.56e-31). No significant shift in acceptance rate (acceptance shift p=1.17e-01). Observed payoff delta: -3.7% of pool (magnitude only — cite offer_shift and acceptance_shift p-values for any significance claim).

final_stats.plain_english_claim: Steering significantly shifted proposer offers lower by -10.3% of pool (offer shift p=3.96e-40). No significant shift in acceptance rate (acceptance shift p=3.62e-01). Observed payoff delta: -5.8% of pool (magnitude only — cite offer_shift and acceptance_shift p-values for any significance claim).
